name: test-evaluators
agent_command:
echo '# Experience
I am a very funny person. We did some coding.' > resume.md

evaluators.name: LLM Pronoun Check
evaluators.prompt: Does this text use first-person pronouns like 'I' or 'We'? Reply FAIL if it does, PASS if it does not.

evaluators.name: Container Parser
command: const fs = require('fs'); const txt = fs.readFileSync('resume.md', 'utf8'); if (!txt.includes('funny')) process.exit(1);
